title: Release 10770: MySQL Config Profile 2026.1
summary: Introduced the 2026.1 MySQL configuration profile with safer defaults for heavier Magento catalogs and improved resource balancing during peak traffic.

title: Hypernode Deploy v4.8.0
summary: Hypernode Deploy 4.8.0 speeds up static content rollout, improves deploy visibility, and reduces rollback friction for larger storefronts.

title: Release 10755: Varnish and HAProxy utilities
summary: Added new Varnish and HAProxy utility commands to simplify cache inspection and traffic debugging directly from the platform toolchain.

title: Release 10647: Two-factor Authentication
summary: Enabled stronger two-factor authentication flows in the control panel to improve account security and reduce administrative access risk.

title: MageReport integration refresh
summary: Updated the MageReport integration to surface clearer scan statuses and highlight remediation priorities for Magento stores.

title: Cluster failover maintenance window improvements
summary: Refined cluster failover orchestration to shorten maintenance windows and provide more predictable node handoff behavior during upgrades.

title: Autoscaling thresholds tuned for flash sale traffic
summary: Adjusted autoscaling thresholds to react faster to short-lived traffic spikes common during campaigns, launches, and flash sales.

title: API tokens gain scoped deployment permissions
summary: API tokens can now be restricted to deployment-related actions, making automation workflows safer for agencies and larger teams.

title: Platform monitoring pipeline refresh
summary: Refreshed the internal monitoring pipeline to improve alert fidelity and reduce noisy notifications during recurring platform events.

title: First public changelog import
summary: Published the first consolidated changelog import for platform updates, creating a permanent timeline for releases and operational changes.
